items.title: Why Amgen (AMGN) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
items.description: Amgen (AMGN) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

items.title: Amgen Repatha Phase 3 Trial Meets Dual Primary Endpoints for Primary Cardiovascular Prevention
items.description: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) is one of the best growth stocks to buy now. On October 2, Amgen announced that its landmark Phase 3 VESALIUS-CV clinical trial met its dual primary endpoints, confirming that Repatha (evolocumab) significantly reduced the risk of Major Adverse Cardiovascular Events/MACE in high-risk individuals without a prior history of heart attack or […]
